overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking alongside a stationary train at dawn, then crossing tracks into open countryside. The character encounters horse riders and carriages on a dirt road before a sudden weather change brings a rain storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: gravel path alongside stationary passenger train

agents.ego_description: walking steadily alongside the stationary train cars on a gravel path

entered.detail: dark green passenger car with large windows and Central Union Railroad lettering
metal train tracks running parallel to the walking path
small wooden platform structure with roof
large rock formation visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a gravel path next to a stationary green passenger train at dawn. The railway tracks run parallel on the right, while a small wooden station building sits in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: gap between train cars at railway siding

events.description: passing between two connected train cars into the gap
crossing the railway tracks to the other side

agents.ego_description: navigating between train cars and crossing the tracks to enter open countryside

entered.detail: green boxcar with CJRC and 4201 markings
small cabin car at the end of the train
wooden utility poles with wire lines

segments.scene_description: The character moves between train cars, passing freight cars and a caboose. After crossing the tracks, the open countryside becomes visible ahead as the train cars fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road through grassy prairie

events.description: horse rider passes by on the left heading in the same direction
multiple horse-drawn carriages pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt road, moving aside for passing horse riders and carriages

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past the character
horse-drawn carriage moving along the road toward the camera

entered.detail: muddy dirt path with wagon wheel ruts
tall green grass on both sides of the road

segments.scene_description: Having left the train behind, the character walks along a dirt road through open prairie. Horse riders and carriages pass by on the road, while rocky outcrops and telegraph poles dot the landscape under the morning sun.

events.description: weather suddenly changes to rain storm with dark clouds and reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the dirt road as rain begins to fall

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past in the rain

entered.detail: wooden fence line along the grassy field

segments.scene_description: The weather abruptly shifts to a rain storm with dark clouds covering the sky. The character continues walking along the dirt road as a horse rider gallops past in the downpour, and wooden fence posts appear along the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a quiet railway station at dawn and transitions into a stormy trek across the open prairie. It begins with the character walking along a gravel path beside a stationary green passenger train, passing a small wooden station building in the distance. As the camera moves between freight cars and a caboose, the character crosses the tracks, leaving the train behind as the landscape opens into a wide countryside. The scene then expands into a sunlit prairie where the character walks along a dirt road past horse riders, carriages, and telegraph poles. Finally, the morning light vanishes as dark clouds abruptly trigger a rain storm, turning the road into a downpour where a lone rider gallops past wooden fence posts.
